scripts.build: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.app.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.node.json && vite build
scripts.build:default: VITE_CHAIN_SUBCONVERTER_UI_SCHEME=default tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.app.json && VITE_CHAIN_SUBCONVERTER_UI_SCHEME=default tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.node.json && VITE_CHAIN_SUBCONVERTER_UI_SCHEME=default vite build
scripts.build:a: VITE_CHAIN_SUBCONVERTER_UI_SCHEME=a tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.app.json && VITE_CHAIN_SUBCONVERTER_UI_SCHEME=a tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.node.json && VITE_CHAIN_SUBCONVERTER_UI_SCHEME=a vite build
scripts.build:b: VITE_CHAIN_SUBCONVERTER_UI_SCHEME=b tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.app.json && VITE_CHAIN_SUBCONVERTER_UI_SCHEME=b tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.node.json && VITE_CHAIN_SUBCONVERTER_UI_SCHEME=b vite build
scripts.build:c: VITE_CHAIN_SUBCONVERTER_UI_SCHEME=c tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.app.json && VITE_CHAIN_SUBCONVERTER_UI_SCHEME=c tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.node.json && VITE_CHAIN_SUBCONVERTER_UI_SCHEME=c vite build
